---
title: "Polarizing Provisions"
description: |
  Where do you stand?
date: '2026-07-14'
image: "sandwich.jpg"
categories:
    - Food
format: html
toc: true
lightbox: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  error: false
  message: false
draft: false
---

```{r}
library(here)
source(here("packages.R"))
source(here("functions.R"))

series_filter = 18

data = pollresults(series_filter)
```

```{r}
#| label: fig-overview
#| fig-cap: "Votes and shares for each question (faceted)."
#| fig-width: 9
#| fig-height: 10.5
faceted_bar_plot(data)
```
